heading: Department of Energy transportation fuels from Illinois basin coal
label: 15977 Department of Energy transportation fuels from Illinois basin coal

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out a program to evaluate the commercial and technical viability of advanced technologies for the production of Fischer-Tropsch transportation fuels, and other transportation fuels, manufactured from Illinois basin coal, including the capital modification of existing facilities and the construction of testing facilities under subsection (b).
Southern Illinois University Coal Research Center;
University of Kentucky Center for Applied Energy Research; and

children.heading: Gasification products test center
children.label: c Gasification products test center
children.text: In conjunction with the activities described in subsections (a) and (b), the Secretary shall construct a test center to evaluate and confirm liquid and gas products from syngas catalysis in order that the system has an output of at least 500 gallons of Fischer-Tropsch transportation fuel per day in a 24-hour operation.

children.heading: Selection of processes
children.label: 1 Selection of processes
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall select processes for evaluating the commercial and technical viability of different processes of producing Fischer-Tropsch transportation fuels, and other transportation fuels, from Illinois basin coal.August 8, 2005

children.label: A
children.text: to carry out the activities described in this section, at the facilities described in subsection (b); and

children.label: B
children.text: for the capital modifications or construction of the facilities at the locations described in subsection (b).

children.heading: Evaluations
children.label: 3 Evaluations
children.text: Not later than 3 years after , the Secretary shall begin, at the facilities described in subsection (b), evaluation of the technical and commercial viability of different processes of producing Fischer-Tropsch transportation fuels, and other transportation fuels, from Illinois basin coal.August 8, 2005

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall construct the facilities described in subsection (b) at the lowest cost practicable.

children.heading: Grants or agreements
children.label: B Grants or agreements
children.text: The Secretary may make grants or enter into agreements or contracts with the institutions of higher education described in subsection (b).

children.heading: Cost sharing
children.label: e Cost sharing
children.text: The cost of making grants under this section shall be shared in accordance with .section 16352 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: f Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $85,000,000 for the period of fiscal years 2006 through 2010.
